summary: iOS Zoom Prevention Testing - All 11 test items verified. Viewport meta tag, CSS text-size-adjust, overflow prevention, input/select font sizes, and modal max-width all correctly implemented. No horizontal overflow at 375px or 320px viewports.

viewport_meta_tag.details: Meta viewport tag is exactly: width=device-width, initial-scale=1, maximum-scale=1, user-scalable=0, viewport-fit=cover

css_text_size_adjust.details: html,body has -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%, -moz-text-size-adjust: 100%, text-size-adjust: 100% in index.css lines 23-30

horizontal_overflow_375px.details: At 375px on /hive page: scrollWidth=375, clientWidth=375. No horizontal overflow detected.

horizontal_overflow_320px.details: At 320px (iPhone SE) on /hive page: scrollWidth=320, clientWidth=320. No horizontal overflow detected.

body_overflow_x.details: body has overflow-x: hidden and max-width: 375px (100vw) at 375px viewport. Verified via computed styles.

root_overflow.details: #root has overflow-x: hidden and max-width: 375px (100vw). Verified via computed styles.

input_font_size.details: input.jsx uses text-base class (16px on mobile). Login inputs verified at 16px font-size. textarea.jsx also uses text-base.

select_font_size.details: CSS rule in index.css lines 43-49 applies font-size: 16px !important to select and [role="combobox"] on screens ≤768px

modal_max_width.details: Now Spinning modal has max-sm:max-w-[95vw] class. Verified dialog width is 356.25px at 375px viewport (95% of 375).

collection_buttons_375px.details: Vault page at 375px has no horizontal scroll (scrollWidth=clientWidth=375). Buttons layout verified in flex-row.

no_regressions.details: Composer bar, filter dropdown, and feed render correctly at 375px. No UI regressions observed.

context_for_next_testing_agent: iOS zoom prevention fixes verified. Key implementations: (1) viewport meta with maximum-scale=1, user-scalable=0 in index.html line 11, (2) text-size-adjust: 100% in index.css, (3) overflow-x: hidden on body and #root, (4) 16px font-size on inputs/selects via text-base class and CSS media query, (5) modals use max-sm:max-w-[95vw] for mobile viewport fit. WebSocket 503 errors observed in console but not affecting UI functionality.
screenshots: .screenshots/ios_zoom_spinning_modal_375.png - Now Spinning modal at 375px showing proper max-width
.screenshots/ios_zoom_vault_375.png - Vault page at 375px showing no horizontal overflow
.screenshots/ios_zoom_vault_320.png - Vault page at 320px (iPhone SE) showing no horizontal overflow

code_review_verification.index_html_line_11: viewport meta tag with maximum-scale=1, user-scalable=0, viewport-fit=cover - VERIFIED
code_review_verification.input_jsx_line_10: text-base class for 16px mobile font - VERIFIED
code_review_verification.textarea_jsx_line_9: text-base class for 16px mobile font - VERIFIED
